data.body:
Investigated all GHA workflow failure history + open parentless bugs.
DISPOSITION:
- verify-identity (11 fails): FIXED on HEAD by 4aba744a1 (mount tickets store); env exit-2, never an authorship rejection. No action.
- eval/prompt-eval (2): FIXED on HEAD by c71d0ce97 (gold_set added to plan-review-g7). Offline strict-validate gate = its own regression check.
- release (1, v0.7.0): FIXED on HEAD by 440095133 (GH_REPO in github_release job). Stale tag.
- terraform-drift: A1 real aws_instance.gerrit user_data drift = working-as-designed ops signal (needs terraform apply, approval-gated); A2 OIDC assume-role = env, resolved by action bump. No code defect.
- external-integration (non-blocking manual/scheduled): FM-1 fixed (424127399); FM-2 ref-lock push = env (CI token contents:read); FM-3 code-review-disabled vs pydantic_ai = real config/code signal; FM-4 gate_source ungated in text-mode test = real test signal; FM-5 live-Jira single flake; FM-6 stale pre-cutover.
- test.yml: Mode A (grounding crash->timeout) & Mode B (acli 429) FIXED on HEAD by 2b13e6ae6 (de-flake, HEAD~1); failing runs were pre-fix commits 80a4a152b/4262e3794. Mode C store-concurrency 'could not parse HEAD' one-off on 5348d2adf. Dependabot #119 action bumps introduced NO new failure.
- gerrit-verify (blocking gate): Mode 1 test_warm_resolution_is_cheap (test_config_perf.py:191, assert elapsed<0.5) = ONLY live flake, owned by ticket 19d7 (in_progress, another agent); Mode 2/3 fixed by 2b13e6ae6; Mode 4 get_baseline AttributeError = bad-patchset legitimate rejection.
PARENTLESS OPEN BUGS: 19d7(owned), b228(open->WORKING), d9aa(open->WORKING confirmed), d30c(local-live-only, self-skips CI), 6cca(not CI-wired), 4c6c/5e40/02a3(gate-behavior, not GHA), 0d3e/15a1/dc33(auto-lander, OBSOLETED by ADR0047/bcf0), c593/e983(autodeploy ops, approval-gated).
FIX TARGETS this session: d9aa (test store-leak, deterministic) + b228 (perf timing flake). Class: fragile timing / test-isolation under xdist.
